articles.title: FDA retracts test result but still links Taylor Farms lettuce to cyclosporiasis - The Washington Post
articles.description: The FDA did not back away from its conclusion that the company remains linked to a multistate outbreak of cyclosporiasis through its investigation.
articles.content: The Food and Drug Administration said Sunday that a laboratory finding showing cyclospora contamination in a sample of shredded iceberg lettuce supplied by Taylor Farms de Mexico was a false positive.
